scope: provider capability registry without credential disclosure
allowlisted AkShare, Qlib and TuShare data jobs
explicit provider, symbols, dates and Runtime output form
RuntimeIndexer invalidation after successful data jobs
Data Ops integration inside the existing Runtime workspace
quarantined import and filtered export with SHA-256 manifests
chunked duplicate/date coverage with optional exact disk-bounded scan
TickFlow daily, minute, quote and Level-2 provider-specific forms
DataRecorder forward streaming jobs with progress and cancellation
institutional command rail, typed workspace tabs and operations dock
internal QuantAgent help route without external vn.py redirect
single-select backtest context and factor usefulness lifecycle filters
wheel zoom, drag pan and keyboard chart navigation
source-alignment audit and parity registry update
outOfScope: credential-free real network smoke where the operator provider requires credentials

nextSlices.reason: Adds discoverable per-rule configuration, persistence and real paper pre-order interception evidence while keeping QuantAgent RiskGate canonical.
Adds BaseMonitor-style keyed updates and explicit live, stale, disconnected and replay-gap state for orders, trades, positions, accounts, logs and risk events.
Connects OrderManager, RiskGate, orders, trades, positions, accounts, reconciliation and restart recovery in paper-only mode.
Connects viewport changes to trade and statistic tables, adds incremental updates and establishes 100k and 500k point browser baselines.
Introduces governed script commands first and authenticated process RPC only where isolation is required.
Audits Alpha101 and Alpha158 formulas, source columns, PIT behavior, numeric equivalence and accepted or rejected factor assignment.
Runs authenticated TickFlow/AkShare/TuShare smoke tests and records large-data throughput without reopening the completed DataManager interaction slice.

safetyInvariants: agents and models cannot submit orders directly
all orders pass RiskGate and KillSwitch
Web jobs accept allowlisted structured commands only
all Web job outputs remain inside Runtime
runtime and checkpoints are never silently rewritten
mock, stale, failed and unverified results remain explicit
